108 AC1M AC1M_BEDCTHS_DAY (AC1M) In Bedclothes Much of Day CHAR 1 Customary routine: ADL patterns - in bedclothes much of day. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
109 AC1N AC1N_TOLIET_NIGHT (AC1N) Wakens to Toilet Most Nights CHAR 1 Customary routine: ADL patterns - wakens to toilet most nights. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
110 AC1O AC1O_IRREG_BOWEL (AC1O) Has Irregular Bowel Movement Pattern CHAR 1 Customary routine: ADL patterns - has irregular bowel movement
